title: Adobe CJM ExperienceEvent - Custom Execution Metrics
description: Per-call execution telemetry for outbound HTTP deliveries through customer-configured channels in Adobe Journey Optimizer.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Execution Type
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: The kind of execution this event represents.

meta:enum.channel: Outbound delivery through a customer-configured channel

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Endpoint
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: The configured endpoint URL in template form, with query parameters removed. Absent when no request was attempted.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: HTTP Method
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: The HTTP method used for the call. Absent when no request was attempted.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Request Timestamp
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Timestamp captured immediately before the request is sent. Absent when no request was attempted.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Response Time
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Time in milliseconds for the request/response exchange with the endpoint. Equals the configured timeout for a timed-out request. Absent when no request was attempted.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Wait Time
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Time in milliseconds the request waited in the dispatch queue before the exchange began.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Status Code
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: The HTTP response status code returned by the endpoint. Absent when no response was received.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Throttle Applicable
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Whether a throttling configuration applies to this delivery.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Cache Applicable
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Whether a response-cache configuration applies to this delivery.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Cache Hit
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Whether the response was served from the response cache.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Error Code
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: A code describing the failure. Absent on success.

meta:enum.AUTH_CACHE_IO: Authentication step failed reading or writing its token cache
meta:enum.AUTH_HTTP_ERROR: Authentication request returned an HTTP error
meta:enum.AUTH_TOKEN_PARSE: Authentication token response could not be parsed
meta:enum.AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Authentication token was expired and could not be refreshed
meta:enum.REQUEST_GENERATION_ERROR: The request could not be constructed before sending
meta:enum.HTTP_4XX: The endpoint returned a 4xx client error
meta:enum.HTTP_5XX: The endpoint returned a 5xx server error
meta:enum.HTTP_TIMEOUT: The call exceeded the configured timeout
meta:enum.HTTP_PARSE_ERROR: The endpoint response could not be parsed

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Error Reason
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: A human-readable description of the failure, for drilldown. Absent on success.
